stemHtml: The objective of Standardised European Rules of the Air (SERA) Regulation (EU) No 923/2012 is to establish the (1) _____ and operational provisions regarding services and procedures in air navigation. SERA shall apply to aircraft engaged in general air traffic, the Competent Authorities of (2) _____, aerodrome operators, and ground personnel engaged in aircraft operations.

options.a: (1) rules of the air that shall apply within the EU; (2) ICAO Contracting States, certification authorities
options.b: (1) rules of the air that shall apply within the EU; (2) EU Member States, military aviation authorities
options.c: (1) common rules of the air; (2) ICAO Contracting States, search and rescue service providers
options.d: (1) common rules of the air; (2) EU Member States, air navigation service providers
